keyEvents.text: Goal! Curaçao 1, Bermuda 0. Tahith Chong (Curaçao) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Goal! Curaçao 2, Bermuda 0. Tahith Chong (Curaçao) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Jearl Margaritha.
Goal! Curaçao 2, Bermuda 1. Kane Crichlow (Bermuda) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ne-Jai Tucker with a cross following a set piece situation.

Goal! Curaçao 2, Bermuda 2. Djair Parfitt-Williams (Bermuda) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Dante Leverock with a through ball following a fast break.
First Half ends, Curaçao 2, Bermuda 2.
Substitution, Bermuda. Julian Carpenter replaces Dante Leverock.
Substitution, Bermuda. Zeiko Lewis replaces Ne-Jai Tucker.
Substitution, Curaçao. Tyrese Noslin replaces Jearl Margaritha.
Substitution, Bermuda. Justin Donawa replaces Djair Parfitt-Williams.
Goal! Curaçao 3, Bermuda 2. Tyrese Noslin (Curaçao) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right to the top left corner. Assisted by Tahith Chong.
Substitution, Curaçao. Juriën Gaari replaces Riechedly Bazoer.
Substitution, Curaçao. Gervane Kastaneer replaces Jürgen Locadia.
Substitution, Curaçao. Joshua Zimmerman replaces Jeremy Antonisse.

Substitution, Bermuda. Roger Lee replaces Keziah Martin.
Substitution, Curaçao. Livano Comenencia replaces Tahith Chong.
Second Half ends, Curaçao 3, Bermuda 2.
